summary: End-to-end testing of the new EMANATOR_NEW_PIPELINE feature. The new 3-stage pipeline (classify archetype → generate plan → build in 4 waves → review → repair) is WORKING. Successfully verified that Emanator generates Signup, Login, and Dashboard pages WITHOUT being explicitly requested in the Creative Brief - this is the KEY user-facing assertion.

integration_issues.issue: Generated files have literal '\n' strings instead of actual newlines, causing Babel compile errors in the preview iframe. Files like pages/Signup.jsx, pages/Dashboard.jsx, app/page.jsx fail to parse.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix the file content saving in the new pipeline - files are being saved with literal '\n' strings instead of actual newline characters. This breaks Babel parsing in the preview.
Check the saveFiles function or the LLM response parsing to ensure newlines are properly converted

The issue appears to be in how the LLM-generated code is being stored/retrieved - the content shows 'export default function Signup({ onNavigate }) {\n  const handleSignup...' instead of actual newlines
critical_code_review_comments: The new pipeline architecture is correctly implemented - archetype classification, plan generation, 4-wave building, review, and repair all work
BriefProgressCard UI shows archetype badge ('SaaS tool / B2B software') correctly
17 files were generated including all required auth flows (Signup, Login, Dashboard, AuthContext, MockAPIProvider)
The file content newline issue is likely in the recipes.js or brief-builder.js where LLM output is processed before saving
seed_data_creation: Created Nexsara project with Creative Brief: Brand='Nexsara', Description='AI-powered marketing platform', Pages='Home, Features, Pricing' (NOT Sign Up/Login/Dashboard)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The EMANATOR_NEW_PIPELINE=1 flag is enabled and working. The pipeline successfully generates multi-page apps with auth flows even when not requested. The main issue is that generated file content has literal '\n' strings instead of actual newlines, breaking Babel preview. Check /app/lib/ai/brief-builder.js and /app/lib/ai/recipes.js for how file content is processed.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The LLM-generated file content is being saved with escaped newline characters ('\n') instead of actual newline characters. This causes Babel to fail parsing the JSX files in the preview iframe.
reproduction_steps: 1. Login to Emanator with REDACTED_LEAKED_USER / REDACTED_LEAKED_PASSWORD
2. Click 'Start Building' and fill Creative Brief with Brand='Nexsara', Pages='Home, Features, Pricing'
3. Click 'Build Project' and wait for pipeline to complete (~2-3 minutes)
4. Open the project and click 'Preview' tab
5. Observe Babel compile errors in console: 'Expecting Unicode escape sequence \uXXXX'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: In the file saving logic, ensure that escaped newlines (\n) are converted to actual newline characters before saving. This may require JSON.parse() or a string replacement on the LLM output.

new_pipeline_verification.wave_building: PASS - All 4 waves completed (scaffold, public, auth, app)
new_pipeline_verification.review_and_repair: PASS - Review found 3 missing + 1 broken, repair fixed 4 files
new_pipeline_verification.key_assertion: PASS - Signup.jsx was generated WITHOUT being requested in the brief
